title: CHILDCARE & MORE - 211info
text: YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE CHILDCARE & MORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of preschool, afterschool, and enrichment classes such as art and dance at locations throughout the community. 601 SW Second Avenue Suite 110 Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Ages 0-18; most activities for ages 0-12 Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 223-9622 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 223-9622 Main phone Main phone (503) 223-9622 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Income verification if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Preschools Y Facilities Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - ENRICHMENT CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF COLUMBIA-WILLAMETTE
